title: Gate target access with visibility
description: Set visibility so a target is reachable only by the packages meant to use it, enforcing module boundaries at build time.
body: Use when exposing a library across packages or tightening an internal API. Do not default everything to //visibility:public. Actions: set visibility to the specific packages or a package_group that should depend on the target; keep internal helpers private; review changes that widen visibility. Validation signals include a visibility error when an unauthorized package tries to depend on a private target. Risk boundary: public-by-default erodes module boundaries and invites unwanted coupling, so grant the narrowest visibility that works.
